tagline: Query profiles updated for improved usability: Query profiles have been updated to improve usability and help you quickly access key insights.
what_it_does: Query profiles updated for improved usability: Query profiles have been updated to improve usability and help you quickly access key insights. You can use a query profile to visualize the details of a query execution. The query profile helps you troubleshoot performance bottlenecks during the query's execution.
why_it_matters: Query profiles updated for improved usability: Query profiles have been updated to improve usability and help you quickly access key insights.
key_takeaway: Query profiles updated for improved usability: Query profiles have been updated to improve usability and help you quickly access key insights.
